Not good for beginners and to users not Familiar or new to using their hands to move around, with most travel routes near impossible or straight up inaccessible completely at the start of the game. Hopefully aids such as ladders are added as I feel they'd be of big help to new players.

reviews.review_title: Pretty fun, just needs more is all.
reviews.review_description:
It’s fun, not gonna lie. Completely shat myself the first time I played it.

Training grounds is fun, I love the laser gate function to train your running.

Atmosphere? Amazing. Ambience and all. I feel like I’m being watched constantly, even when the monster hasn’t spawned yet.

I think it could use more stuff, and that will take some time. I know. Great games take time, they’re not made instantly.

Anyone who says this game ‘isn’t replayable’ just doesn’t have the patience to keep playing through it. Challenge yourself if you’re one of those people. The higher difficulties exist for a reason! Play it with friends even!

Overall, 7/10. Like I said, needs time. I’d love some more maps in the future, maybe more monsters too? We’ll see. Thanks for the amazing game.

The game achieves horror, and polish pretty well, here’s what I like about the game.
I like gorilla tag locomotion
The whole monster design is new and interesting.
The way of identifying rats in multiplayer by appearance rather than name tag is cool, and adds a lot to immersion
The practice arena in the TV is a cool new addition
Updates are meaningful and add stuff that’s always worth at least checking out 
The graphics are nice
The sound design is nice 
The gameplay loop, although repetitive, is new

However, there are a few problems, both new and old
New, with the removal of the server browser it streamlined the interface but I personally miss having the option
Old, gameplay loop gets repetitive, even with some higher difficulties
New, monster ate me through a wal.
Old, map has no randomization except for the location of buttons and the lost rat.
Updates are rare, maybe 2-5 times a year
And, the movement feels more clumsy compared to other gorilla tag locomotion games.

Overall, a fun experience with friends, a decent experience in singe player, and the pros mostly outweigh the cons, 7.5/10

P.S I still think the $7 was a better price, even if $10 is pretty fair
